data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check complete. Changes: (1) shared prompt template lines 81-91 rewritten from sprint-context to config-driven APPROACH_RESOLUTION routing with autonomous/interactive modes, (2) resolution loop test prompt updated from sprint context to approach_resolution=autonomous, (3) interactive test prompt updated from sprint context to approach_resolution=interactive, (4) interactive test rubric updated to remove sprint invocation references
